title: Chinese Buddhist: Vimalakirti Sutra (Kumarajiva) (4)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Vimalakirti Sutra (Kumarajiva)
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Vimalakirti Sutra (Kumarajiva)

translation.text: From Vimalakirti Sutra (Kumarajiva): A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
